nodes.label:
User
(browser)
nodes.description: Builders and admins. Auth via Supabase JWT.

nodes.label:
Supabase Auth
(JWT)
nodes.description: Issues JWTs the frontend attaches via apiFetch; backend verifies (HS256/RS256/ES256) and checks user_roles for admin.

nodes.label:
Lab lifecycle
/lab/<ruleset>/*
nodes.description: legends → build → eval. RuleSet-scoped team building and evaluation. The core user surface.

nodes.label:
Community + profile
+ players explorer
nodes.description: Leaderboard of public Saved Teams, user profile, player explorer.

nodes.label:
Admin surfaces
/admin/*
nodes.description: Calibration (threshold editor), pipeline dashboard, review queue, legends editor, rulesets, cohesion calibration. Requires user_roles.role = 'admin'.

nodes.label:
apiFetch<T>()
lib/api.ts
nodes.description: Single chokepoint for all backend calls — injects JWT + base URL. Types in lib/types.ts mirror backend shapes. Envelope: { success, data, error }.

nodes.label: Flask app — 17 blueprints
nodes.description: app.py factory. Blueprints: builder, calibration, players, legends, pipeline, review, rulesets, saved_teams, community, evaluation_versions, snapshots… @require_admin guards admin writes (JWT + user_roles).

nodes.label:
skill_engine/
stat → skill
nodes.description: Evaluates 21 skills against JSONB threshold rules: conditions, tier bumps, auto-promotions, stabilization, pre-adjustments (deepcopy is load-bearing). Writes skill_profiles (source: stats).

nodes.label:
Pipeline orchestration
stats_assembler + nba_api_client
nodes.description: Fetch → assemble player_stats JSONB → evaluate → persist. Plus salary_scraper for salary ingestion.

nodes.label:
claude_assessment
+ compositing
nodes.description: Claude rates the same 21 skills; compositing merges vs stat ratings — agreements auto-accepted, disagreements become skill_flags for the review queue.

nodes.label:
cohesion_engine/
team evaluation
nodes.description: Sole evaluation engine: lineup subscores, composites, synergies, accentuation, rotation combos, bell-curve normalization, Claude narrative. Warmed from the active Evaluation Version at startup.

nodes.label:
evaluation_versions/
immutable snapshots
nodes.description: Publishes cohesion weights + composites as immutable versions. One active at a time; Saved Teams pin a version.

nodes.label: Supabase PostgreSQL
nodes.description: player_stats, skill_profiles, skill_flags, legends, rulesets + versions, evaluation_versions, saved_teams, rosters, snapshot tables, user_roles. SECURITY DEFINER RPCs locked to service_role (linted).

nodes.label: Dev deploy — develop → hestia
nodes.description: Push to develop → self-hosted GH Actions runner builds both Docker images (frontend + backend) → dev stack at cornerstone-dev.hestia.chrooks.com with its own self-hosted Supabase. Deploy-time only — not part of the runtime request path.

nodes.label: NBA.com Stats
nodes.description: Live season stats, fetched via the nba_api Python client.

nodes.label: Claude API
nodes.description: Skill ratings (second opinion vs stats engine), legend suggestions, team narratives.

edges.description: Main product journey: pick RuleSet, pick legend, build, evaluate.

edges.label: login
edges.description: Supabase auth forms (login/signup) issue the session JWT.

edges.label: JWT
edges.description: apiFetch injects the session token on every backend call.

edges.label: HTTP + JWT
edges.description: REST calls; every response uses the { success, data, error } envelope.

edges.label: evaluate
edges.description: Calibration + pipeline blueprints drive stat→skill evaluation.

edges.label: assess / suggest
edges.description: Composite profiles, review-queue flags, legend suggestions.

edges.label: POST /builder/evaluate
edges.description: The Lab eval path — subscores, synergies, narrative.

edges.label: fetch
edges.description: nba_api client pulls live stats from NBA.com.

edges.label: team narrative
edges.description: Claude-powered cohesion narrative (issues #79/#80/#81 aim to move this off the request path).

edges.label: reads snapshots
edges.description: Production cohesion reads skill profiles from the active Snapshot Release.

edges.label: CRUD
edges.description: Rosters, saved teams, legends, rulesets via supabase_client singleton.
